message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.real + numpy.imag passthrough wrappers (br-franken_numpy-7asp, br-franken_numpy-43nw)

Expose fnp_python.real delegating to numpy.real(val) and fnp_python.imag
delegating to numpy.imag(val). Joint parity oracle test covers:
- complex scalar extraction (1.5 - 2.25j -> 1.5 real / -2.25 imag)
- 1-D complex ndarray real/imag separation
- real-dtype input: real is identity, imag is zeros_like
- integer input: imag all-zero integer array
- 2-D complex array element-wise
- view semantics: shares_memory parity with source for complex input
